sentences.target: Ich spreche ungern in der Öffentlichkeit.

translations.de: Ich spreche ungern in der Öffentlichkeit.
translations.en: I don’t like speaking in public.
translations.es: No me gusta hablar en público.
translations.fr: Je n'aime pas parler en public.
translations.it: Non mi piace parlare in pubblico.
translations.ko: 나는 사람들 앞에서 말하는 걸 좋아하지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不喜欢在公众场合讲话。
translations.yue: 我唔鍾意喺公眾場合講嘢。
translations.ru: Я не люблю выступать на публике.
translations.pt: Não gosto de falar em público.
translations.he: אני לא אוהב לדבר מול קהל.
translations.vi: Tôi không thích nói trước đám đông.
translations.nl: Ik praat niet graag in het openbaar.
translations.uk: Мені не подобається говорити на людях.
translations.hi: मुझे लोगों के सामने बोलना पसंद नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν μου αρέσει να μιλάω δημόσια.
translations.nb: Jeg liker ikke å snakke foran folk.
translations.id: Saya tidak suka berbicara di depan umum.
translations.sv: Jag gillar inte att prata inför folk.
translations.ro: Nu îmi place să vorbesc în public.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke lide at tale foran folk.
translations.ja: 人前で話すのは好きじゃない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; modified by the adverb 'ungern' and selects the locative PP 'in der Öffentlichkeit'.
Adverb of attitude/preference (positive degree) modifying the verb; expresses doing something unwillingly.
Two-way preposition heading a locative PP; here denotes static location and governs dative case.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner agreeing with 'Öffentlichkeit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'in der Öffentlichkeit' meaning 'in public'.

sentences.target: Sie weint nie in der Öffentlichkeit.

translations.de: Sie weint nie in der Öffentlichkeit.
translations.fr: Elle ne pleure jamais en public.
translations.it: Lei non piange mai in pubblico.
translations.ko: 그녀는 사람들 앞에서 절대 울지 않아요.
translations.yue: 佢從來唔會喺公眾場合喊。
translations.ru: Она никогда не плачет на людях.
translations.he: היא אף פעם לא בוכה בציבור.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không bao giờ khóc nơi công cộng.
translations.ar: هي لا تبكي أبداً أمام الناس.
translations.nl: Ze huilt nooit in het openbaar.
translations.uk: Вона ніколи не плаче на людях.
translations.hi: वह कभी लोगों के सामने नहीं रोती.
translations.pl: Ona nigdy nie płacze przy ludziach.
translations.id: Dia tidak pernah menangis di tempat umum.
translations.ro: Ea nu plânge niciodată în public.
translations.fi: Hän ei koskaan itke ihmisten edessä.
translations.ja: 彼女は人前で泣くことはない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject. Capitalized only because sentence-initial (agreement with 'weint' rules out formal 'Sie').
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive.
Frequency adverb expressing absolute negation ('never'); modifies the verb phrase.
Two-way preposition heading a locative PP; static meaning → governs dative.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Öffentlichkeit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'in der Öffentlichkeit'.

sentences.target: Wir küssen uns nicht in der Öffentlichkeit.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈkʏsən ʊns nɪçt ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈœfn̩tlɪçkaɪ̯t./

translations.de: Wir küssen uns nicht in der Öffentlichkeit.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈkʏsən ʊns nɪçt ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈœfn̩tlɪçkaɪ̯t./
translations.fr: On ne s'embrasse pas en public.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不在公众场合接吻。
translations.yue: 我哋唔會喺公眾場合錫。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không hôn nhau nơi công cộng.
translations.ar: نحن لا نقبّل بعضنا أمام الناس.
translations.nl: We zoenen nicht in het openbaar.
translations.hi: हम लोगों के सामने किस नहीं करते.
translations.id: Kami tidak berciuman di tempat umum.
translations.ja: 私たちは人前でキスしない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'uns' as object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; reflexive/reciprocal object ('each other') coreferential with the subject.
Negation particle (polarity); here focuses on and negates the following PP ('nicht in der Öffentlichkeit' = not in public).
Two-way preposition heading a locative PP; static reading → governs dative.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Öffentlichkeit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'in der Öffentlichkeit'.

sentences.target: Der Sänger steht gern in der Öffentlichkeit.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈzɛŋɐ ʃteːt gɛʁn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈœfn̩tlɪçkaɪ̯t./

translations.de: Der Sänger steht gern in der Öffentlichkeit.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈzɛŋɐ ʃteːt gɛʁn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈœfn̩tlɪçkaɪ̯t./
translations.en: The singer likes being in the public eye.
translations.es: Al cantante le gusta estar en el candelero.
translations.fr: Le chanteur aime être sous les projecteurs.
translations.it: Al cantante piace stare sotto i riflettori.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位歌手喜欢站在聚光灯下。
translations.yue: 嗰位歌手鍾意成為眾人焦點。
translations.pt: O cantor gosta de estar sob os holofotes.
translations.vi: Ca sĩ thích ở dưới ánh đèn sân khấu.
translations.ar: المغني يحب أن يكون تحت الأضواء.
translations.nl: De zanger staat graag in de schijnwerpers.
translations.hu: Az énekes szeret a reflektorfényben lenni.
translations.hi: गायक को सुर्खियों में रहना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Piosenkarz lubi być w centrum uwagi.
translations.el: Ο τραγουδιστής αγαπά τα φώτα της δημοσιότητας.
translations.nb: Sangeren liker å være i rampelyset.
translations.id: Penyanyi itu suka berada di bawah sorotan lampu.
translations.sv: Sångaren gillar att vara i rampljuset.
translations.ro: Cântărețului îi place să fie în lumina reflectoarelor.
translations.da: Sangeren kan godt lide at være i rampelyset.
translations.ja: その歌手はスポットライトを浴びるのが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of 'Sänger'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive, combines with locative PP.

Two-way preposition heading a locative PP; static location → governs dative.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Öffentlichkeit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP 'in der Öffentlichkeit'.

es: No me gusta hablar en público.
Al cantante le gusta estar en el candelero.
fr: Je n'aime pas parler en public.
Elle ne pleure jamais en public.
On ne s'embrasse pas en public.
Le chanteur aime être sous les projecteurs.
it: Non mi piace parlare in pubblico.
Lei non piange mai in pubblico.
Al cantante piace stare sotto i riflettori.

그녀는 사람들 앞에서 절대 울지 않아요.

我们不在公众场合接吻。
这位歌手喜欢站在聚光灯下。

Piosenkarz lubi być w centrum uwagi.
